61970-302_Dynamics-AP-Con-Complex-SHACL

dyn.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit

Nested Properties:

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping
Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia
Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor
Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance
Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance

Nested Properties:

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo-valueRange​

Path: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo
Subtransient rotor time constant (T''o) (> 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo
Transient rotor time constant (T'o) (> AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp
Synchronous reactance (Xs) (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp). Typical value = 1,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp
Transient reactance (unsaturated) (X') (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping
Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia
Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor
Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance
Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tan-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.td-valueRange​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.td
Time constant (TD) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl1-valueRange​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl1
Time constant (TL1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,025.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl2-valueRange​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl2
Time constant (TL2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,25.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tw5-valueRange​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tw5
DEC washout time constant (TW5) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomin
Limiter (VOMIN) (< DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmin
Limiter (VSMIN) (< DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax). Typical value = -0,066.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax

dyn.ExcAC1A​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcAC1A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcAC1A

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcAC1A.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.ka
Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 400.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.kc
Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (Kc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kd-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.kd
Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (Kd) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,38.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.kf
Excitation control system stabilizer gains (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.kf1
Coefficient to allow different usage of the model (Kf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.kf2
Coefficient to allow different usage of the model (Kf2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ks-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.ks
Coefficient to allow different usage of the model-speed coefficient (Ks) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.seve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.seve1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve1, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.seve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.seve2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve2, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tb-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.tb
Voltage regulator time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.tc
Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 0,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC1A.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.tk
Voltage regulator time constant (Tk) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,18.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vamax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vamax
Maximum voltage regulator output (Vamax) (> 0). Typical value = 75.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vamin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vamin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vamin) (< 0). Typical value = -75.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.ve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.ve1
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 7,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.ve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.ve2
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve2) (> 0). Typical value = 5,55.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vfelim-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vfelim
Exciter field current limit reference (Vfelim) (> 0). Typical value = 19.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vhmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vhmax
Maximum field current limiter signal reference (Vhmax) (> 0). Typical value = 75.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vrmax
Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 44.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC6A.vrmin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC6A.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = -36.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcAC8B
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcAC8B

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcAC8B.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.ka
Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.kc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.kc
Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (Kc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,55.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.kd-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.kd
Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (Kd) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.kdr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.kdr
Voltage regulator derivative gain (Kdr) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.kir-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.kir
Voltage regulator integral gain (Kir) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.seve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.seve1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve1, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.seve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.seve2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve2, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.tdr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.tdr
Lag time constant (Tdr) (> 0 if ExcAC8B.kdr > 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.ve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.ve1
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 6,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.ve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.ve2
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve2) (> 0). Typical value = 9.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.vemin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.vemin
Minimum exciter voltage output (Vemin) (<= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.vimin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.vimin
Input signal minimum (Vimin) (< ExcAC8B.vimax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcAC8B.vimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcAC8B.vimax

dyn.ExcAC8B.vpidmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.vpidmin
PID minimum controller output (Vpidmin) (< ExcAC8B.vpidmax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcAC8B.vpidmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcAC8B.vpidmax

dyn.ExcAC8B.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.vrmax
Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 35.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC8B.vrmin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcAC8B.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcBBC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcBBC

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcBBC.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.efdmin
Minimum open circuit exciter voltage (Efdmin) (< ExcBBC.efdmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcBBC.efdmax

dyn.ExcBBC.t1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.t1
Controller time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 6.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.t2
Controller time constant (T2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t3-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.t3
Lead/lag time constant (T3) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t4-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.t4
Lead/lag time constant (T4) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.vrmin
Minimum control element output (Vrmin) (< ExcBBC.vrmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcBBC.vrmax

dyn.ExcBBC.xe-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcBBC.xe
Effective excitation transformer reactance (Xe) (>= 0). Xe models the regulation of the transformer/rectifier unit. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.efd2-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

dyn.ExcDC1A.seefd1-valueRange​

dyn.ExcDC1A.seefd2-valueRange​

dyn.ExcDC1A.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC1A.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 0,46.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC1A.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcDC1A.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0 and < ExcDC1A.vrmax). Typical value = -0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcDC1A.vrmax; or positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcDC1A.vrmax

dyn.ExcDC2A​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcDC2A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcDC2A

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcDC2A.efd1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.efd1
Exciter voltage at which exciter saturation is defined (Efd1) (> 0). Typical value = 3,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.efd2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.efd2
Exciter voltage at which exciter saturation is defined (Efd2) (> 0). Typical value = 2,29.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.ka
Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 300.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.kf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.kf
Excitation control system stabilizer gain (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.seefd1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.seefd1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd1 (Se[Efd1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,279.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.seefd2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.seefd2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd2 (Se[Efd2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,117.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.tb-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.tb
Voltage regulator time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.tc
Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,33.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 0,675.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.tf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.tf1
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC2A.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcDC2A.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0 and < ExcDC2A.vrmax). Typical value = -4,9.

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcDC2A.vrmax; or positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcDC2A.vrmax

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.ki-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.kp-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.ta-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative or zero."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A1.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,83.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.tf-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A1.vb1max-valueRange​

Available exciter voltage limiter (Vb1max) (> 0). Typical value = 11,63.

dyn.ExcDC3A1.vbmax-valueRange​

dyn.ExcDC3A1.vrmin-valueRangePair​

dyn.ExcDC3A​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcDC3A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcDC3A

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcDC3A.efd1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.efd1
Exciter voltage at which exciter saturation is defined (Efd1) (> 0). Typical value = 2,6.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.efd2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.efd2
Exciter voltage at which exciter saturation is defined (Efd2) (> 0). Typical value = 3,45.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.efdmin
Minimum voltage exciter output limiter (Efdmin) (< ExcDC3A.efdmax). Typical value = -99.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcDC3A.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcDC3A.efdmax

dyn.ExcDC3A.kv-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.kv
Fast raise/lower contact setting (Kv) (> 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.seefd1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.seefd1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd1 (Se[Efd1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.seefd2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.seefd2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd2 (Se[Efd2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,35.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,83.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.trh-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.trh
Rheostat travel time (Trh) (> 0). Typical value = 20.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.vrmax
Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC3A.vrmin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcDC3A.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (<= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.efmin

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcELIN1.efmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcELIN1.efmax

dyn.ExcELIN1.tfi-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.tfi
Current transducer time constant (Tfi) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.tnu-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.tnu
Controller reset time constant (Tnu) (>= 0). Typical value = 2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.ts1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.ts1
Stabilizer phase lag time constant (Ts1) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.ts2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.ts2
Stabilizer filter time constant (Ts2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.tsw-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.tsw
Stabilizer parameters (Tsw) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.xe-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN1.xe
Excitation transformer effective reactance (Xe) (>= 0). Xe represents the regulation of the transformer/rectifier unit. Typical value = 0,06.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.ve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcELIN2.ve1
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 3.

  • "The value is negative or zero."

dyn.ExcELIN2.ve2-valueRange​

dyn.ExcHU​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcHU
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcHU

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcHU.emin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcHU.emin
Field voltage control signal lower limit on AVR base (Emin) (< ExcHU.emax). Typical value = -0,866.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcHU.emax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcHU.emax

dyn.ExcHU.imin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcHU.imin
Major loop PI tag output signal lower limit (Imin) (< ExcHU.imax). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcHU.imax

dyn.ExcHU.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcHU.te
Major loop PI tag integration time constant (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,154.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcHU.ti-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcHU.ti
Minor loop PI control tag integration time constant (Ti) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,01333.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcHU.tr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcHU.tr
Filter time constant (Tr) (>= 0). If a voltage compensator is used in conjunction with this excitation system model, Tr should be set to 0. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails

dyn.ExcIEEEAC1A.kd-valueRange​

dyn.ExcIEEEAC1A.te-valueRange​

dyn.ExcIEEEAC1A.tf-valueRange​

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.kd-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.kd
Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (KD) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,35.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.ke-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.ke
Exciter constant related to self-excited field (KE) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.kf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.kf
Excitation control system stabilizer gains (KF) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.kh-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.kh
Exciter field current feedback gain (KH) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.seve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.seve1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, VE1, back of commutating reactance (SE[VE1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,037.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.seve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.seve2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, VE2, back of commutating reactance (SE[VE2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,012.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (TA) (> 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.tb-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.tb
Voltage regulator time constant (TB) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.tc
Voltage regulator time constant (TC) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (TE) (> 0). Typical value = 0,6.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (TF) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.vamax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.vamax
Maximum voltage regulator output (VAMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.vamin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.vamin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VAMIN) (< 0). Typical value = -8.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.ve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.ve1
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (VE1) (> 0). Typical value = 4,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.ve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.ve2
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (VE2) (> 0). Typical value = 3,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.vfemax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.vfemax
Exciter field current limit reference (VFEMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 4,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC2A.vrmax

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC2A.vrmin-valueRange​

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Voltage regulator derivative gain (KDR) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf1
Excitation control system stabilizer gain (KF1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,212.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf2
Excitation control system stabilizer gain (KF2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf3-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kf3
Excitation control system stabilizer gain (KF3) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kia-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kia
Voltage regulator integral gain (KIA) (>= 0). Typical value = 59,69.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kir-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kir
Voltage regulator integral gain (KIR) (>= 0). Typical value = 4,24.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.kp-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.kp
Potential circuit gain coefficient (KP) (> 0). Typical value = 4,96.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.seve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.seve1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, VE1, back of commutating reactance (SE[VE1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,44.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.seve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.seve2
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, VE2, back of commutating reactance (SE[VE2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,075.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.tdr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.tdr
Lag time constant (TDR) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.te
Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (TE) (> 0). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (TF) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.vamax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.vamax
Maximum voltage regulator output (VAMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.vamin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.vamin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VAMIN) (< 0). Typical value = -0,95.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.ve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.ve1
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (VE1) (> 0). Typical value = 6,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.ve2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.ve2
Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (VE2) (> 0). Typical value = 3,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.vemin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.vemin
Minimum exciter voltage output (VEMIN) (<= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.vrmax
Maximum voltage regulator output (VRMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 5,79.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC7B.vrmin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC7B.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (< 0). Typical value = -5,79.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B​

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC8B.ka
Voltage regulator gain (KA) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.kc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC8B.kc
Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (KC) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,55.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.kd-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC8B.kd
Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (KD) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.kdr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC8B.kdr
Voltage regulator derivative gain (KDR) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.kir-valueRange​

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEAC8B.seve1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEAC8B.seve1
Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, VE1, back of commutating reactance (SE[VE1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (< 0 and < ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmax). Typical value = -0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmax; or positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcIEEEDC1A.vrmax

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.vemin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEDC4B.vemin
Minimum exciter voltage output (VEMIN) (<= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (<= 0 and < ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax). Typical value = -0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax; or positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax

dyn.ExcIEEEST1A.ka-valueRange​

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST3A.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST3A.ka

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST3A.kc-valueRange​

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcIEEEST7B
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcIEEEST7B

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.kh-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.kh
High-value gate feedback gain (KH) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.kia-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.kia
Voltage regulator integral gain (KIA) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.kl-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.kl
Low-value gate feedback gain (KL) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.kpa-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.kpa
Voltage regulator proportional gain (KPA) (> 0). Typical value = 40.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tb-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.tb
Regulator lag time constant (TB) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.tc
Regulator lead time constant (TC) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.tf
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (TF) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tg-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.tg
Feedback time constant of inner loop field voltage regulator (TG) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tia-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.tia
Feedback time constant (TIA) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vmax
Maximum voltage reference signal (VMAX) (> 0 and > ExcIEEEST7B.vmin). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vmin
Minimum voltage reference signal (VMIN) (> 0 and < ExcIEEEST7B.vmax). Typical value = 0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEST7B.vmax; or negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vmax

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmax
Maximum voltage regulator output (VRMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmin-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (< 0). Typical value = -4,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcNI
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcNI

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcNI.ka-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.ka
Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 210.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.kf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.kf
Excitation control system stabilizer gain (Kf) (> 0). Typical value 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.r-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.r
rc / rfd (R) (>= 0). 0 means exciter has negative current capability

0 means exciter does not have negative current capability.
Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.tf1
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf1) (> 0). Typical value = 1,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tf2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.tf2
Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf2) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcNI.tr
Time constant (Tr) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcNI.vrmin
Minimum voltage regulator ouput (Vrmin) (< ExcNI.vrmax). Typical value = -2,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcNI.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcNI.vrmax

dyn.ExcPIC​

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcPIC.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.efdmin
Exciter minimum limit (Efdmin) (< ExcPIC.efdmax). Typical value = -0,87.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcPIC.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcPIC.efdmax

dyn.ExcPIC.ta1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.ta1
PI controller time constant (Ta1) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.ta2-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.ta3-valueRange​

Lead time constant (Ta3) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.ta4-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.te
Exciter time constant (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.tf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.tf1
Rate feedback time constant (Tf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.tf2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.tf2
Rate feedback lag time constant (Tf2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcPIC.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcPIC.vrmin
Voltage regulator minimum limit (Vrmin) (< ExcPIC.vrmax). Typical value = -0,87.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcPIC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

dyn.ExcREXS​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcREXS
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcREXS

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcREXS.kf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.kf
Rate feedback gain (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.ta
Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tb1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tb1
Lag time constant (Tb1) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tb2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tb2
Lag time constant (Tb2) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tc1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tc1
Lead time constant (Tc1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tc2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tc2
Lead time constant (Tc2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.te
Exciter field time constant (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tf
Rate feedback time constant (Tf) (>= 0). If = 0, the feedback path is not used. Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tf1
Feedback lead time constant (Tf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf2-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tf2
Feedback lag time constant (Tf2) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tp-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.tp
Field current bridge time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.vfmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.vfmin
Minimum exciter field current (Vfmin) (< ExcREXS.vfmax). Typical value = -20.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcREXS.vfmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcREXS.vfmax

dyn.ExcREXS.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcREXS.vrmin
Minimum controller output (Vrmin) (< ExcREXS.vrmax). Typical value = -20.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcREXS.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcREXS.vrmax

  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcSK

dyn.ExcSK.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcSK.efdmin

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcSK.efdmax

dyn.ExcSK.emin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcSK.emin
Minimum field voltage output (Emin) (< ExcSK.emax). Typical value = -20.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.emax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcSK.emax

dyn.ExcSK.sbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.sbase
Apparent power of the unit (Sbase) (> 0). Unit = MVA. Typical value = 259.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.tc
PI controller phase lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.te-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.te
Time constant of gain block (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.ti-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.ti
PI controller phase lead time constant (Ti) (>= 0). Typical value = 2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.tp-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.tp
Time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.tr-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcSK.tr
Voltage transducer time constant (Tr) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcSK.uimin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcSK.uimin
Minimum error (UImin) (< ExcSK.uimax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.uimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcSK.uimax

dyn.ExcSK.urmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcSK.urmin
Minimum controller output (URmin) (< ExcSK.urmax). Typical value = -10.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.urmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcSK.urmax

dyn.ExcSK.vtmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcSK.vtmin
Minimum terminal voltage input (Vtmin) (< ExcSK.vtmax). Determines the range of voltage deadband. Typical value = 0,95.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcSK.vtmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcSK.vtmax

dyn.ExcST1A.ta-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST1A.tb-valueRange​

dyn.ExcST1A.tb1-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcST1A.tb1
Voltage regulator time constant (Tb1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vmax-valueRange​

Path: cim.ExcST7B.vmax

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.ExcST7B.vmin
Minimum voltage reference signal (Vmin) (> 0 and < ExcST7B.vmax). Typical value = 0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcST7B.vmax; or negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vrmax-valueRange​

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT1.maxerr."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT1.maxerr

dyn.GovCT1.tb-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tc-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tdgov-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

dyn.GovCT1.teng-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT1.teng
Transport time delay for diesel engine used in representing diesel engines where there is a small but measurable transport delay between a change in fuel flow setting and the development of torque (Teng) (>= 0). Teng should be zero in all but special cases where this transport delay is of particular concern. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tfload-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT1.tfload
Load-limiter time constant (Tfload) (> 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tpelec-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT1.tpelec
Electrical power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tsa-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT1.tsa
Temperature detection lead time constant (Tsa) (>= 0). Typical value = 4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tsb-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT1.tsb
Temperature detection lag time constant (Tsb) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.vmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovCT1.vmin
Minimum valve position limit (Vmin) (< GovCT1.vmax). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT1.vmax

dyn.GovCT2​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovCT2
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovCT2

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovCT2.minerr-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovCT2.minerr
Minimum value for speed error signal (Minerr) (< GovCT2.maxerr). Typical value = -1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT2.maxerr."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT2.maxerr

dyn.GovCT2.mwbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.mwbase
Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.ta-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.ta
Acceleration limiter time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tact-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tact
Actuator time constant (Tact) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tb-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tb
Turbine lag time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tc
Turbine lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tdgov-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tdgov
Governor derivative controller time constant (Tdgov) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.teng-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.teng
Transport time delay for diesel engine used in representing diesel engines where there is a small but measurable transport delay between a change in fuel flow setting and the development of torque (Teng) (>= 0). Teng should be zero in all but special cases where this transport delay is of particular concern. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tfload-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tfload
Load limiter time constant (Tfload) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tpelec-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tpelec
Electrical power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (>= 0). Typical value = 2,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tsa-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tsa
Temperature detection lead time constant (Tsa) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tsb-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovCT2.tsb
Temperature detection lag time constant (Tsb) (>= 0). Typical value = 50.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.vmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovCT2.vmin
Minimum valve position limit (Vmin) (< GovCT2.vmax). Typical value = 0,175.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT2.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT2.vmax

dyn.GovGAST1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovGAST1

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovGAST1.b-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.b
Turbine power time constant denominator scale factor (b) (>0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.mwbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.mwbase
Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.r-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.r
Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t1-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.t1
Governor mechanism time constant (T1) (>= 0). T1 represents the natural valve positioning time constant of the governor for small disturbances, as seen when rate limiting is not in effect. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t2-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.t2
Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of the free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t3-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.t3
Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). T3 represents delay in the exhaust temperature and load limiting system. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t4-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.t4
Governor lead time constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t5-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.t5
Governor lag time constant (T5) (>= 0). If = 0, entire gain and lead-lag block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.tltr-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.tltr
Valve position averaging time constant (Tltr) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.vmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovGAST1.vmin
Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST1.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovGAST1.vmax

Fuel system time constant (Tf) (>= 0).

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.tmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum turbine limit (Tmin) (< GovGAST2.tmax).

Governor lead time constant (X) (>= 0).

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.y-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative or zero."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tc-valueRange​

Compressor discharge volume time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.td-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST3.td
Temperature controller derivative gain (Td) (>= 0). Typical value = 3,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tg-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST3.tg
Time constant of speed governor (Tg) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tsi-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST3.tsi
Time constant of radiation shield (Tsi) (>= 0). Typical value = 15.

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.ttc-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.ty-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovGAST3.ty
Time constant of fuel valve positioner (Ty) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydro1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydro1

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydro1.at-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.at
Turbine gain (At) (> 0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.dturb-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.dturb
Turbine damping factor (Dturb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.gmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.gmin
Minimum gate opening (Gmin) (>= 0 and < GovHydro1.gmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydro1.gmax; or negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydro1.gmax

dyn.GovHydro1.mwbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.mwbase
Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.qnl-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.qnl
No-load flow at nominal head (qnl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.rperm-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.rperm
Temporary droop (r) (GovHydro1.rtemp > GovHydro1.rperm). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value of GovHydro1.rperm is either equal to or greater than GovHydro1.rtemp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydro1.rtemp

dyn.GovHydro1.rperm-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.rperm
Permanent droop (R) (> 0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tf-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.tf
Filter time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tg-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.tg
Gate servo time constant (Tg) (> 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tr-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.tr
Washout time constant (Tr) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tw-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.tw
Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.velm-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydro1.velm
Maximum gate velocity (Vlem) (> 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro2.mwbase-valueRange​

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails

dyn.GovHydro2.uc-valueRange​

dyn.GovHydroR.t7-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroR.t7

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroR.td-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroR.tp-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroR.tt-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroR.tt

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroR.tw-valueRange​
