dyn.GovHydroWEH​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroWEH
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydroWEH

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydroWEH.gmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.gmin
Minimum gate position (Gmin) (< GovHydroWEH.gmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroWEH.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydroWEH.gmax

dyn.GovHydroWEH.mwbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.mwbase
Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.td-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.td
Derivative controller time constant (Td) (>= 0). Limits the derivative characteristic beyond a breakdown frequency to avoid amplification of high-frequency noise.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tdv-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.tdv
Distributive valve time lag time constant (Tdv) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tg-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.tg
Value to allow the distribution valve controller to advance beyond the gate movement rate limit (Tg) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tp-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.tp
Pilot valve time lag time constant (Tp) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tpe-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.tpe
Electrical power droop time constant (Tpe) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tw-valueRange​

Path: cim.GovHydroWEH.tw
Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamFV3.ta-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamFV3.tb-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamFV3.tc-valueRange​

ComponentDetails

dyn.MechanicalLoadDynamics​

MechanicalLoadDynamics shall have either an association to SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics.

Messages:

  • "Required association to either SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics is missing."

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.MechanicalLoadUserDefined
  • targetClass: cim.MechLoad1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.MechanicalLoadDynamics

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.XoneConstraintComponentShapes: [N3366616f30e8485e86ee83df9e005110, N6f7734496f6543e59d098c91151647de]

Path: cim.Pss2B.t1
Lead/lag time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,12.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.Pss2B.t9-valueRange​

dyn.Pss2B.vsi1min-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.Pss2B.vsi1min
Input signal #1 minimum limit (Vsi1min) (< Pss2B.vsi1max). Typical value = -2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than Pss2B.vsi1max."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.Pss2B.vsi1max

dyn.Pss2B.vsi2min-valueRangePair​

sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.Pss2B.vsi2max

dyn.Pss2B.vstmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.Pss2B.vstmin

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than Pss2B.vstmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.Pss2B.vstmax

dyn.Pss2ST​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.Pss2ST
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.Pss2ST

Nested Properties:

dyn.Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type-allowedValues​

Path: cim.Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type
Type of input signal #1 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative). Typical value = rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type-allowedValues​

Path: cim.Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type
Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.Pss2ST.lsmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.Pss2ST.lsmin
Limiter (LSMIN) (< Pss2ST.lsmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than Pss2ST.lsmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.Pss2ST.lsmax

dyn.Pss2ST.t1-valueRange​

Path: cim.Pss2ST.t1
Time constant (T1) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssELIN2.ppss-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssELIN2.ppss
Coefficient (p_PSS) (>= 0 and <= 4). Typical value = 0,1.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 4.0

dyn.PssPTIST3.dtc-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssPTIST3.dtc
Time step related to activation of controls (deltatc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,025 (0,03 for 50 Hz).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssPTIST3.dtf-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssPTIST3.dtp-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssPTIST3.nav-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssPTIST3.nav
Number of control outputs to average (NAV) (1 <= NAV <= 16). Typical value = 4.

Messages:

  • "The value is outside the range [1,16]."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 1.0
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 16.0

dyn.PssPTIST3.ncl-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssPTIST3.ncl

dyn.PssWECC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.PssWECC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.PssWECC

Nested Properties:

dyn.PssWECC.inputSignal1Type-allowedValues​

Path: cim.PssWECC.inputSignal1Type
Type of input signal #1 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative). Typical value = rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.PssWECC.inputSignal2Type-allowedValues​

Path: cim.PssWECC.inputSignal2Type
Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.PssWECC.t1-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t1
Input signal 1 transducer time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,037.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t10-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t10
Lag time constant (T10) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t2-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t2
Input signal 2 transducer time constant (T2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t3-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t3
Stabilizer washout time constant (T3) (>= 0). Typical value = 9,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t4-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t4
Stabilizer washout time lag constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 9,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t5-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t5
Lead time constant (T5) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,7.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t6-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t6
Lag time constant (T6) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t7-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t7
Lead time constant (T7) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,7.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t8-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t8
Lag time constant (T8) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.t9-valueRange​

Path: cim.PssWECC.t9
Lead time constant (T9) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.PssWECC.vsmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.PssWECC.vsmin
Minimum output signal (Vsmin) (< PssWECC.vsmax). Typical value = -0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than PssWECC.vsmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.PssWECC.vsmax

dyn.SynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.SynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.SynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit

Nested Properties:

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping
Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia
Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor
Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance
Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineDetailed.efdBaseRatio-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineDetailed.efdBaseRatio
Ratio (exciter voltage/generator voltage) of Efd bases of exciter and generator models (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineDetailed.saturationFactorQAxis-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineDetailed.saturationFactorQAxis
Quadrature-axis saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1q) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineSimplified​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.SynchronousMachineSimplified
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.SynchronousMachineSimplified

Nested Properties:

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping
Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia
Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor
Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance
Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Nested Properties:

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping
Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia
Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor
Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance
Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineDetailed.efdBaseRatio-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineDetailed.efdBaseRatio
Ratio (exciter voltage/generator voltage) of Efd bases of exciter and generator models (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineDetailed.saturationFactorQAxis-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineDetailed.saturationFactorQAxis
Quadrature-axis saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1q) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.ks-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.ks
Saturation loading correction factor (Ks) (>= 0). Used only by type J model. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tc-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tc
Damping time constant for “Canay” reactance (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpdo-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppdo
Direct-axis transient rotor time constant (T'do) (> SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppdo). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpdo."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpdo

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppdo-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppdo
Direct-axis subtransient rotor time constant (T''do) (> 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppqo-valueRange​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppqo
Quadrature-axis subtransient rotor time constant (T''qo) (> 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpqo-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppqo
Quadrature-axis transient rotor time constant (T'qo) (> SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppqo). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpqo."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpqo

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans
Direct-axis transient reactance (unsaturated) (X'd) (>= SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSync-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans
Direct-axis synchronous reactance (Xd) (>= SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectTrans). The quotient of a sustained value of that AC component of armature voltage that is produced by the total direct-axis flux due to direct-axis armature current and the value of the AC component of this current, the machine running at rated speed. Typical value = 1,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSync."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSync

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans
Quadrature-axis transient reactance (X'q) (>= SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSync-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans
Quadrature-axis synchronous reactance (Xq) (>= SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadTrans). The ratio of the component of reactive armature voltage, due to the quadrature-axis component of armature current, to this component of current, under steady state conditions and at rated frequency. Typical value = 1,6.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSync."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSync

  • targetClass: cim.SynchronousMachineUserDefined

This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance
Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

dyn.TurbLCFB1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.TurbLCFB1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.TurbLCFB1

Nested Properties:

dyn.TurbLCFB1.mwbase-valueRange​

Path: cim.TurbLCFB1.mwbase
Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.TurbLCFB1.tpelec-valueRange​

Path: cim.TurbLCFB1.tpelec
Power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.TurbineGovernorDynamics​

TurbineGovernorDynamics shall have either an association to SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics.

Messages:

  • "Required association to either SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics is missing."

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydro3
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroPID
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroWEH
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydro2
  • targetClass: cim.GovSteamEU
  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST4
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroDD
  • targetClass: cim.GovSteam0
  • targetClass: cim.GovSteamFV4
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroR
  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroPID2

Nested Properties:

dyn.UnderexcLim2Simplified.vuimin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.UnderexcLim2Simplified.vuimin
Minimum error signal (VUIMIN) (< UnderexcLim2Simplified.vuimax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than UnderexcLim2Simplified.vuimax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.UnderexcLim2Simplified.vuimax

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC

Nested Properties:

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dprefmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dprefmin
Minimum (negative) ramp rate of pWTref request from the plant controller to the wind turbines (dprefmin) (< WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dprefmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dprefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dprefmax

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dpwprefmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dpwprefmin
Maximum negative ramp rate for wind plant power reference (dpWPrefmin) (< WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dpwprefmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dpwprefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.dpwprefmax

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.kiwppmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.kiwppmin
Minimum PI integrator term (KIWPpmin) (< WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.kiwppmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.kiwppmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.kiwppmax

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.prefmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.prefmin
Minimum pWTref request from the plant controller to the wind turbines (prefmin) (< WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.prefmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.prefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.prefmax

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.tpft-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.tpft
Lead time constant in reference value transfer function (Tpft) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.tpfv-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.tpfv
Lag time constant in reference value transfer function (Tpfv) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.twpffiltp-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.twpffiltp
Filter time constant for frequency measurement (TWPffiltp) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.twppfiltp-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantFreqPcontrolIEC.twppfiltp
Filter time constant for active power measurement (TWPpfiltp) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC

Nested Properties:

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.dxrefmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.dxrefmin
Maximum negative ramp rate for wind turbine reactive power/voltage reference (dxrefmin) (< WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.dxrefmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.dxrefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.dxrefmax

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.kiwpxmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.kiwpxmin
Minimum reactive power/voltage reference from integration (KIWPxmin) (< WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.kiwpxmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.kiwpxmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.kiwpxmax

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.tuqfilt-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.tuqfilt
Filter time constant for voltage-dependent reactive power (Tuqfilt) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twppfiltq-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twppfiltq
Filter time constant for active power measurement (TWPpfiltq) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twpqfiltq-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twpqfiltq
Filter time constant for reactive power measurement (TWPqfiltq) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twpufiltq-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.twpufiltq
Filter time constant for voltage measurement (TWPufiltq) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.txft-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.txft
Lead time constant in reference value transfer function (Txft) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.txfv-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.txfv
Lag time constant in reference value transfer function (Txfv) (>= 0). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.xrefmin-valueRangePair​

Path: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.xrefmin
Minimum xWTref (qWTref or delta uWTref) request from the plant controller (xrefmin) (< WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.xrefmax). It is a project-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.xrefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.WindPlantReactiveControlIEC.xrefmax

dyn.WindProtectionIEC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.WindProtectionIEC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.WindProtectionIEC

Nested Properties:

dyn.WindProtectionIEC.tfma-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindProtectionIEC.tfma
Time interval of moving average window (TfMA) (>= 0). It is a type-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.WindRefFrameRotIEC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.WindRefFrameRotIEC

Nested Properties:

dyn.WindRefFrameRotIEC.tpll-valueRange​

Path: cim.WindRefFrameRotIEC.tpll
Time constant for PLL first order filter model (TPLL) (>= 0). It is a type-dependent parameter.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
